title: ForgePrecheck
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3.F — Required pre-mutation gate for arif_forge. Kept as a separate schema (not folded into the existing forge schema) per spec instruction. This file lives at the real path /root/arifOS/arifosmcp/schemas/symbolic/forge_precheck.schema.json (spec said /opt/arifos/app/mcp_servers/arifos/core/schemas/forge_precheck.schema.json — that path does not exist). Additive only. Hard rule: if symbolic authority is uncertain, FORGE must dry_run only — not a warning, a gate.

judge_verdict_present.description: True iff a prior arif_judge verdict (SEAL/CAUTION/HOLD/VOID) exists for this action.

symbolic_authority_verified.description: True iff the symbol_owner has been verified (not 'unknown').

irreversible_effect_declared.description: True iff the caller has explicitly declared the irreversibility of this action.

social_blast_radius.description: Estimated blast radius layers affected by this forge action.

false_symbol_risk.description: Risk that this forge action will be misread as a constitutional SEAL or other authority it does not carry.

dry_run_only.description: Optional override. If true, the forge runs in dry-run mode regardless of other fields.

ack_irreversible.description: Mirrors arif_act.ack_irreversible. Must be true if any layer of social_blast_radius implies irreversibility.

allOf.description: Coherence: if false_symbol_risk is high, dry_run_only must be true.
Coherence: if blast_radius includes 'legal' or 'financial', ack_irreversible must be true.
